title: PRIMARY CARE - 211info
text: GLADSTONE HEALTH CENTER PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessment and treatment for addictions and substance use or abuse. 18911 Portland Avenue Gladstone, OR 97027 Eligibility: Ages 12-18 Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm, Friday 8am-5pm (503) 655-8471 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-8471 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured and underinsured patients. Minimum $20 fee due at time of medical appointment for uninsured patients. No one is refused care due to an inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday 8am-6pm, Wednesday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC SPECIALTY MEDICINE - PEDIATRIC CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GLADSTONE HEALTH CENTER
